name: Pineapple Sausage & Bean Crockpot Meal
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces pineapple chunks in light syrup
1 pound reduced fat Polish Kielbasa, cut into 1 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the slow cooker or crock pot.
2. Cook on low setting for 5 hours or high setting for 3 hours.
3. Stir occasionally throughout cooking time.
4. Serves 6.
5. Each serving contains approximately 342.7 calories and 12.7 grams of fat.
